zones.notes: Min lot >=43,560 sf (1 ac). Max net residential density 1 du/ac; max 1 du per lot of record. Street-side 20 ft. Garage face 20 ft (alley-loaded 9 ft). Open space 10% of gross acres. Reachable via api.municode.com (Supp. 66, jobId 484949, productId 14275).

Six lot categories A-F by lot area: A 4,950-7,999; B 8,000-11,999; C 12,000-17,999; D 18,000-27,999; E 28,000-43,559; F >=43,560 sf. Binding minimum (Cat A) recorded: lot area 4,950 sf, width 45, front 12, side 5, rear 15, coverage 45%. Cat F: width 130, front 30, side 20, rear 30, coverage 25%. Max height 35 ft all cats. Max 1 du per lot of record. Street-side 15 ft (20 ft Cat E/F).

Min lot area 2,800 sf/du absolute floor (note 1). Cat A 800-4,949 (duplex/triplex 4,000-4,949); Cat B 4,950-7,999; Cat C 8,000-11,999; Cat D >=12,000. Cat A width 35; front 10/side 5/rear 10; Cat D front 15, side 10, rear 20. Height 35 ft. Max 3 du per lot of record. Side may reduce to 0 ft for attached units. No lot-coverage column (TBD). Open space 20-25%.

Min lot size 1 acre (43,560 sf) per Sec. 106-2.5.B. Net density >8 du/ac. Setbacks ROW/adjacency-based: arterial ROW 20; collector/local ROW 15 (front recorded 15, may reduce to 10); adjacent to residential 10/15/20 (side recorded 10); adjacent to non-residential 20. No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 45/50/60 ft by tier (recorded 45); 30 ft cap at setback line adjacent to SF/2F/3F. Townhouses (Table 106-2f): lot 1,200 sf, width 20, front 3, rear 10, side 5, height 45. Open space 150 sf/du.

Min development parcel 1 acre (43,560 sf); min 5,500 sf/du. Max gross density 8 du/ac (min 4 du/lot). Setbacks ROW/adjacency-based: arterial ROW 20; collector/local ROW 15 (front recorded 15, may reduce to 10); adjacent to residential 15; adjacent to non-residential 10 (side recorded 10). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 45 ft (30 at setback line adjacent to RR/R-1/R-2). Max building footprint 5,000 sf.

Min development parcel 1 acre. Gross density 8-20 du/ac (max 20). Cat A 3,700-5,500 sf/du, Cat B >=2,000 sf/du. Setbacks ROW/adjacency: arterial ROW 20; collector/local ROW 15 (front recorded 15, may reduce to 10); adjacent to residential 15 (A)/20 (B); adjacent to non-residential 20 (side recorded 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 50 (A)/60 (B); 30 at setback adjacent to RR/R-1/R-2. Max footprint 30,000 sf; max non-residential tenant 15,000 sf.

Min resort MSP project 20 acres (871,200 sf) recorded as min_lot_size_sf. Gross density 8-20 du/ac; each residential lot max 3 du, min 3,500 sf/du. Values shown are binding minimum from Table 106-5d residential lot Cat A (lot 4,000-7,999; width 40; front 12; side 5; rear 12; height 30; coverage 50%). Overall-project perimeter setbacks (5c): arterial 35, collector/local 20, adj residential 45, adj non-residential 30; net open space 30%. Non-residential parcels (5e) height up to 45-50 ft.

Min lot area 12,000 sf. Setbacks ROW/adjacency: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 15 (front recorded 15); adjacent to residential 20; adjacent to non-residential 15 (side recorded 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 30 ft. Max per tenant 5,000 sf; max commerce center 10 ac. No lot-width/coverage/density columns (TBD).

Min lot area 12,000 sf. Setbacks: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 20 (front 20); adjacent to residential 20; adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 35 ft (30 at setback adjacent to RR/R-1/R-2). Max per tenant 5,000 sf; max center 10 ac.

Min lot area 18,000 sf. Setbacks: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 20 (front 20); adjacent to residential 30; adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 40 ft (30 at setback adjacent to RR/R-1/R-2). Max per tenant 45,000 sf; max center 20 ac.

Min lot area 90,000 sf (may reduce to 18,000 for pad sites in a commerce center >=90,000 sf). Setbacks: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 20 (front 20); adjacent to residential 45; adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 45 ft (30 at setback adjacent to RR/R-1/R-2). No max per tenant/center.

Min lot area 20 acres (871,200 sf); pad sites may reduce to 1 acre. Min parcel to request BP zoning 50 acres. Setbacks: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 25 (front 25); adjacent to residential 75 (may reduce to 15 with 45-ft buffer tract); adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 45 ft (+1 ft setback per 1 ft above 30 ft adjacent to residential).

Min lot area 20,000 sf. Setbacks: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 35 (front 35); adjacent to residential 50 (may reduce to 15 with 30-ft buffer); adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 40 ft (+1 ft per 1 ft above 30 adjacent to residential).

Min lot area 5 acres (217,800 sf). Setbacks: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 35 (front 35); adjacent to residential 75 (may reduce to 15 with 45-ft buffer); adjacent to non-residential 25 (side 25). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 85 ft (+1 ft per 1 ft above 30 adjacent to residential).

Min lot area 40 acres (1,742,400 sf). Setbacks: arterial ROW 50; collector/local ROW 50 (front 50); adjacent to residential 150 (may reduce to 75 with 50-ft buffer); adjacent to non-residential 50 (side 50). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 40 ft (+1 ft per 1 ft above 30 adjacent to residential).

Min parcel to establish OS-1 is 10 acres (435,600 sf); civic districts otherwise have no minimum lot size. Setbacks: arterial/collector/local ROW 15 (front 15); adjacent to residential 50; adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 15 ft.

Civic districts have no minimum lot size (TBD). Setbacks: ROW 15 (front 15); adjacent to residential 15; adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 35 ft (may increase 10 ft, up to 60, per additional 5 ft from side/rear line).
Per Sec. 106-8.4.B.2, dimensional standards are determined case-by-case through the site plan process; no fixed table. All fields TBD by design.

Planned/floating district via rezoning. Seven lot categories A-G: A 2,000-3,499; B 3,500-4,949; C 4,950-7,999; D 8,000-11,999; E 12,000-17,999; F 18,000+; G multi/commercial 16,000. Binding minimum (Cat A): lot 2,000 sf, width 35, front 5, side 5, rear 2, coverage 70%, height 30. Cat F width 90, front 30, rear 30, coverage 40%; Cat G height 45 ft. Side may reduce to 0 for attached units.

Planned/floating (TND), via rezoning. Min lot 6,000 sf. Setbacks: arterial ROW 20; collector/local ROW 15 (front 15); adjacent to residential 10 (20 from SF) (side 10); adjacent to non-residential 15. No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 40 ft (30 at setback adjacent to SF/2F/3F).

Planned/floating (TND), via rezoning. Min lot 16,000 sf; min 2,000 sf/du. Setbacks: arterial ROW 20; collector/local ROW 20 (may reduce to 10) (front 20); adjacent to residential 10 (20 from SF) (side 10); adjacent to non-residential 20. No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 45 ft (30 at setback adjacent to SF/2F/3F).
Planned/floating (TND), via rezoning. Min lot N/A (TBD). Setbacks: ROW 15 (front 15); adjacent to residential 15; adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 35 ft.
